mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(duration_seconds) / 60, 0) AS totalMinutes, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN duration_seconds END) / 60, 0) AS todayMinutes, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN YEARWEEK(create_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(), 1) THEN duration_seconds END) / 60, 0) AS weekMinutes, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') THEN duration_seconds END) / 60, 0) AS monthMinutes, IFNULL(SUM(duration_seconds) / 60 / NULLIF(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MIN(DATE(create_time))) + 1, 0), 0) AS avgDailyMinutes FROM biz_learning_activity WHERE student_id = #{studentId}

SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, IFNULL(SUM(duration_seconds) / 60, 0) AS minutes FROM biz_learning_activity WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT activity_type AS activityType, IFNULL(SUM(duration_seconds) / 60, 0) AS minutes, ROUND(SUM(duration_seconds) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(duration_seconds) FROM biz_learning_activity WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)), 0), 2) AS percentage FROM biz_learning_activity WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY activity_type ORDER BY minutes DESC

SELECT s.id AS subjectId, s.name AS subjectName, IFNULL(SUM(la.duration_seconds) / 60, 0) AS minutes, ROUND(SUM(la.duration_seconds) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(duration_seconds) FROM biz_learning_activity WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)), 0), 2) AS percentage FROM biz_learning_activity la INNER JOIN biz_subject s ON la.subject_id = s.id WHERE la.student_id = #{studentId} AND la.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND la.subject_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY minutes DESC

WITH student_totals AS ( SELECT student_id, SUM(duration_seconds) AS total_seconds FROM biz_learning_activity WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY student_id ), ranked_students AS ( SELECT student_id, total_seconds, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_seconds DESC) AS `rank` FROM student_totals ) SELECT IFNULL(rs.`rank`, 0) AS `rank`, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FROM student_totals) AS totalStudents, ROUND((1 - (rs.`rank` - 1.0) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_totals), 0)) * 100, 2) AS percentile FROM ranked_students rs WHERE rs.student_id = #{studentId}
